_comment: NPC: Governor Zhao Ming (赵明太守). INFERRED — Great Wang Capital inhabitant. Canon ID: INF-GWC-01. Per Article II (Reality First): the Zhao Country capital must have inhabitants. These NPCs are inferred from the city's district structure (governor mansion, temple, market, tavern, port). Prime Directive: these beings exist independently of the player's perception.
name: Governor Zhao Ming
personality: cautious, formal, politically astute; defers to Teng family authority
relationship_to_wanglin: INFERRED — indirect; governor of the country where Wang Lin was born

perception_tiers.foundation: Governor Zhao Ming — Foundation Establishment (mid-stage). INFERRED capital resident.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Governor Zhao Ming — minor figure in the capital's power structure

note: INFERRED from Great Wang Capital district structure. cautious, formal, politically astute; defers to Teng family authority

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi.

initiation_lines: Welcome to the Great Wang Capital. I am Governor Zhao Ming. State your business — the capital has rules that even cultivators must follow.
The Teng family's authority extends to every corner of Zhao Country. My role is to ensure order in their absence. I suggest you do not test that order.
The governor mansion's treasury is well-stocked. Do not mistake my hospitality for weakness. The last thief lost more than his hands.
Cultivators from the sects occasionally visit the capital on official business. If you are one of them, present your sect token. If not... the market district is that way.

sect_tasks.description: Governor Zhao Ming adjusts his official robes: 'The outer provinces are due for their seasonal tax. Bring me 16 bundles of wheat as proof of collection. The capital's granaries must be filled before winter.'
Governor Zhao Ming leans closer: 'I need a report compiled. Bring me paper and ink. The Teng family expects regular updates on the capital's affairs — and I intend to provide them.'
